name: EXHAUSTED || Avery Eriana
description:
—hunted down.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Avery liked her course. she loved fabric. she adored sketching. but she loathed projects that have deadlines. she’s the laziest person she knew, and she knew that she wasn’t going to finish this project on time.

so what better way to waste more of her time than to go bother her girlfriend?

𓏵· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·𓏵
